playbookForge.title: Follow paths others have already proven.
playbookForge.subtitle: Students, coders, professionals, and educators share step-by-step playbooks — guides, checklists, and sprints — tested across every industry. Pick a path. Ship with confidence.

playbooks.title: Ship Production RAG in 14 Days
playbooks.outcome: Deploy a grounded RAG API with eval gates in CI.
playbooks.summary: From chunking strategy to hallucination scoring — a sprint cadence guild ML teams run before every prod launch.

steps.title: Define golden Q&A set
steps.detail: 50 questions with source citations your lawyers or PMs sign off on.

steps.title: Benchmark chunking
steps.detail: Compare fixed, semantic, and parent-child splits on recall@5.

steps.title: Wire eval in CI
steps.detail: Fail builds when faithfulness drops below your threshold.

playbooks.title: Multi-Tenant SaaS in 10 Steps
playbooks.outcome: Tenant-safe schema, auth middleware, and observability dashboards.
playbooks.summary: The checklist B2B teams run before onboarding enterprise customers with data isolation requirements.

steps.title: Schema per isolation model
steps.detail: Choose row-level, schema-per-tenant, or hybrid with tradeoff doc.

steps.title: Middleware tenant context
steps.detail: Inject tenant_id on every request — never trust client headers alone.

steps.title: Ship tenant dashboards
steps.detail: Per-tenant metrics without cross-leak in BI tools.

playbooks.title: Launch an Async Bootcamp
playbooks.outcome: Outcome-aligned cohort with rubrics and LMS integration.
playbooks.summary: Design pacing, assessments, and community touchpoints for learners who can't attend live sessions.

steps.title: Map competencies
steps.detail: 3–5 measurable outcomes per week with rubric levels.

steps.title: Build async rhythm
steps.detail: Weekly drops, office hours, and peer review cycles.

steps.title: Export to LMS
steps.detail: Sync grades and feedback without manual CSV hell.

playbooks.title: Payments Ledger from Zero
playbooks.outcome: Double-entry ledger with idempotency and reconciliation.
playbooks.summary: The sprint fintech backends run before handling real money — sandbox first, prod patterns second.

steps.title: Model double-entry
steps.detail: Accounts, entries, and immutable transaction log.

steps.title: Idempotency keys
steps.detail: Server-side dedup on every external payment event.

steps.title: Nightly reconciliation
steps.detail: Diff provider statements against internal ledger.

playbooks.title: FHIR Integration Bootcamp
playbooks.outcome: HIPAA-aware Patient dashboard pulling live FHIR resources.
playbooks.summary: Clinicians and engineers pair through SMART on FHIR, consent scopes, and de-identified sandboxes.

steps.title: Spin up sandbox
steps.detail: Load synthetic Patient bundles — never prod PHI in dev.

steps.title: Implement SMART auth
steps.detail: Scope reads to what consent allows.

steps.title: Ship clinician view
steps.detail: Observation trends with audit logging.

playbooks.title: Run Your First Purple Team
playbooks.outcome: Documented tabletop with remediation backlog and exec summary.
playbooks.summary: Turn red-team findings into blue-team fixes with a structured tabletop your leadership will fund.

steps.title: Pick scenario
steps.detail: Ransomware, supply chain, or insider — match your threat model.

steps.title: Run 90-min tabletop
steps.detail: Cross-functional roles with timed injects.

steps.title: Publish remediation
steps.detail: Prioritized backlog with owners and dates.

playbooks.title: Rollback Multiplayer in 30 Days
playbooks.outcome: Playable 2-player prototype with desync debugging workflow.
playbooks.summary: Indie studios use this sprint to go from local-only to rollback netcode with replay tooling.

steps.title: Lock input schema
steps.detail: Deterministic inputs — no floats without fixed-point.

steps.title: Implement rollback
steps.detail: Predict, reconcile, and resim on mismatch.

steps.title: Record replays
steps.detail: Frame debugger for every desync report.

playbooks.title: D2C Attribution Setup
playbooks.outcome: Single dashboard reconciling Meta, Google, and email ROAS.
playbooks.summary: Bootstrapped brands normalize UTMs and webhook events before scaling ad spend.

steps.title: UTM schema
steps.detail: One naming convention across every channel.

steps.title: Webhook inventory
steps.detail: Order events with attribution fields intact.

steps.title: Build ROAS view
steps.detail: Weekly cohort LTV vs CAC by source.

playbooks.title: Solar Forecast for Cooperatives
playbooks.outcome: Published forecast API smallholders trust for harvest timing.
playbooks.summary: Field operators and analysts align on PVLib pipelines with inland calibration for monsoon regions.

steps.title: Ingest site data
steps.detail: Irradiance, elevation, and historical yield CSVs.

steps.title: Calibrate model
steps.detail: Retrain with local albedo — coastal defaults fail inland.

steps.title: Publish API
steps.detail: Weekly forecasts with confidence intervals.

playbooks.title: Claims Automation MVP
playbooks.outcome: Policy rules engine with claims API and denial explanations.
playbooks.summary: Insurtech teams ship a rules MVP before integrating legacy core systems.

steps.title: Model policy tree
steps.detail: Exclusions, riders, and edge-case precedence.

steps.title: Claims API stub
steps.detail: Submit, adjudicate, and appeal endpoints.

steps.title: Explain denials
steps.detail: Plain-language reason codes for regulators.

playbooks.title: WCAG AAA Streaming Player
playbooks.outcome: Player passing WCAG AAA with live captions under 2s latency.
playbooks.summary: Streaming clients audit focus order, caption sync, and audio description tracks before launch.

steps.title: Caption pipeline
steps.detail: Chunk cues for mobile buffer constraints.

steps.title: Keyboard nav
steps.detail: Every control reachable without a mouse.

steps.title: Run AAA audit
steps.detail: Automated + manual screen reader pass.

playbooks.title: Contract Summarizer for A2J
playbooks.summary: Build NLP tools that help underserved users understand contracts — bias-tested on multilingual corpora.

steps.title: Curate corpus
steps.detail: Annotated clauses in English, Spanish, and Hindi.

steps.title: Fine-tune extractor
steps.detail: Measure F1 per language — no English-only benchmarks.

steps.title: Ship summary UI
steps.detail: Click clause → see plain-language explanation.

playbooks.title: NDVI Pipeline for Smallholders
playbooks.outcome: Traceable harvest map from satellite tiles to cooperative ledger.
playbooks.summary: Cooperatives fetch Sentinel tiles, run GDAL, and log traceability without enterprise GIS budgets.

steps.title: Fetch tiles
steps.detail: Cloud-free composites for your bounding box.

steps.title: Compute NDVI
steps.detail: Preprocess and mask clouds with GDAL scripts.

steps.title: Log traceability
steps.detail: Link field plots to harvest batches.

playbooks.title: Internal Mobility Skills Graph
playbooks.outcome: Neo4j skills graph with mobility queries and hiring rubrics.
playbooks.summary: HR and eng teams map skills to roles and surface internal candidates before external hires.

steps.title: Import ontology
steps.detail: Skills, roles, and MANAGES_TO / LEADS_TO edges.

steps.title: Mobility queries
steps.detail: IC → manager paths with skill gap analysis.

steps.title: Hiring rubric export
steps.detail: Inclusive criteria tied to graph evidence.

playbooks.title: Permit Portal Go-Live
playbooks.outcome: WCAG-compliant permit API with open-data publishing.
playbooks.summary: Municipal teams launch digital permits without vendor lock-in — civic patterns the guild maintains.

steps.title: API kit fork
steps.detail: Permit submit, status, and document upload stubs.

steps.title: Accessibility audit
steps.detail: Forms and steppers pass mobile screen readers.

steps.title: Publish open data
steps.detail: Permit volumes and timelines for transparency.

playbooks.title: LIMS Chain-of-Custody MVP
playbooks.outcome: Sample tracking with custody events and compliance export.
playbooks.summary: Life-science labs ship custody logging before FDA audits — regulated patterns without enterprise LIMS cost.

steps.title: Sample schema
steps.detail: IDs, locations, and custody state machine.

steps.title: Courier webhooks
steps.detail: Idempotent events from external handlers.

steps.title: Compliance report
steps.detail: Audit-ready custody trail export.
